query:
SELECT ic.id, ic.label, ic.channelNo, i.deviceCode, i.modelType 
FROM instrument_channels ic 
JOIN instruments i ON ic.instrumentId = i.id 
WHERE i.deviceCode = 'C002' 
ORDER BY ic.channelNo;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute SELECT ic.id, ic.label, ic.channelNo, i.deviceCode, i.modelType 
FROM instrument_channels ic 
JOIN instruments i ON ic.instrumentId = i.id 
WHERE i.deviceCode = 'C002' 
ORDER BY ic.channelNo;
